creator: scineram@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD should support longer than 255 byte(?) filenames. I want to switch from TrueNAS Core to vanilla OS, not to Linux. But long filenames might make me. I have hit the limit with yt-dlp many times, and had to cut off video titles on my zfs share. Especially with japanese characters.

I hope bugzilla accepts feature requests.

https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/pull/15921#issuecomment-2384006157
